en: That is not how a chicken sounds. Chickens don't clack!
You know what's risky? Letting your son go on that church thing.
Well, her name's Anne, Dad, and he's not going on her. Hey, pal, you alone?
Almost always, yeah. We need a name.
Maybe Operation Hot Mother. Let's try to top that.
That's not true at all. Chi-cha! Chi-cha! Chi-cha! What is that? Is that a chicken?
What's this? Michael's scared to ask out Sally.
ko: 아, 마이클이 샐리를 데이트 신청하는 게 무서운 거구나. 아니야, 그렇지 않아.

en: No, I'm not. This is priceless.
These aren't even birds. That's enough. There are people working here.
We could double date. You and Sally and me and Anne. Who?
Anne. Yes. Of course I know Anne.
I didn't mean who. I meant her.
That's a great idea. I love Anne. Great.
Excuse me, ma'am. You were flying today, buddy.
